query_texts: CREATE CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX cci_bitpack_probe_bigint_cci ON cci_bitpack_probe_bigint

INSERT INTO cci_bitpack_probe_bigint (pk, dt)
SELECT CAST(pk AS BIGINT) AS pk,
       CAST(36890 + (pk % 4000) AS BIGINT) AS dt
FROM fkr__seed
WHERE pk < 2200000
INSERT INTO fkr__seed SELECT pk + 1048576 FROM (SELECT pk FROM fkr__seed) AS _s
INSERT INTO fkr__seed SELECT pk + 131072 FROM (SELECT pk FROM fkr__seed) AS _s
INSERT INTO fkr__seed SELECT pk + 2097152 FROM (SELECT pk FROM fkr__seed) AS _s WHERE pk < 102848
INSERT INTO fkr__seed SELECT pk + 262144 FROM (SELECT pk FROM fkr__seed) AS _s
INSERT INTO fkr__seed SELECT pk + 32768 FROM (SELECT pk FROM fkr__seed) AS _s
INSERT INTO fkr__seed SELECT pk + 524288 FROM (SELECT pk FROM fkr__seed) AS _s
INSERT INTO fkr__seed SELECT pk + 65536 FROM (SELECT pk FROM fkr__seed) AS _s
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN [pk] IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [pk] FROM [dbo].[fkr__seed]
